name: deepseek
description: DeepSeek V4 API subagent for delegating code review, diff analysis, and pattern checks at Sonnet-class quality and lower cost. V4-Pro matches Opus 4.6 on SWE-bench (80.6%); V4-Flash handles mechanical checks at Haiku-tier cost. Wraps curl invocation with fallback chain, JSON escaping, and structured output.

skills.name: DeepSeek Delegation
skills.description: Delegate tasks to DeepSeek V4 API for code review, diff analysis, and pattern checks at Sonnet-class quality. Use when offloading from Anthropic quota.

agents.name: DeepSeek Bulk Diff Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes full diffs using DeepSeek V4's 1M token context when diffs exceed Claude's truncation threshold

agents.name: DeepSeek Code Analyst
agents.description: Analyzes code patterns, suggests refactorings, and reviews architecture using DeepSeek V4-Pro

agents.name: DeepSeek Agent Runner
agents.description: Generic DeepSeek delegation runner. Loads any target agent's review criteria from a depot plugin path and delegates analysis to DeepSeek V4 API. Called by dm-review Phase 3.75 routing.

commands.name: DeepSeek
commands.description: Direct DeepSeek V4 invocation with model selection
